zh.Boconnoc, Cornwall, England: 英國英格蘭可瓦爾波康諾可
zh.St Michael Penkevil, Cornwall, England: 英國可瓦爾聖 邁克爾 吉維爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Trewynnard Carminowe於1470年出生在英國可瓦爾時，他的父親John Carminow31歲，母親Philippa Trenowith21歲。他於大約1516年與Catherine Wolvedon在英國英格蘭可瓦爾波康諾可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1538年1月17日在英國可瓦爾聖 邁克爾 吉維爾享年68歲。

zh-hans.St Michael Penkevil, Cornwall, England: 英国可瓦爾聖 邁克爾 吉維爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Trewynnard Carminowe于1470年出生在英国可瓦爾时，他的父亲John Carminow31岁，母亲Philippa Trenowith21岁。他于大约1516年与Catherine Wolvedon在英国英格兰可瓦爾波康諾可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1538年1月17日在英国可瓦爾聖 邁克爾 吉維爾享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Trewynnard Carminowe was born in 1470, in Cornwall, England, his father, John Carminow, was 31 and his mother, Philippa Trenowith, was 21. He married Catherine Wolvedon about 1516, in Boconnoc, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 17 January 1538, in St Michael Penkivel, Cornwall, England, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Trewynnard Carminowe est né en 1470, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, John Carminow, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Philippa Trenowith, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Catherine Wolvedon environ 1516, à Boconnoc, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 17 janvier 1538, à St Michael Penkivel, Cornouailles, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Trewynnard Carminowe 1470 in Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Carminow 31 und seine Mutter Philippa Trenowith 21. Er hat um 1516 in Boconnoc, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Catherine Wolvedon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 17. Januar 1538 im Alter von 68 Jahren in St Michael Penkivel, Cornwall, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Trewynnard Carminowe è nato il nel 1470 nel Cornwall, England, il suo padre, John Carminow, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Philippa Trenowith, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Catherine Wolvedon circa 1516, nel Boconnoc, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 17 gennaio 1538, nel St Michael Penkivel, Cornwall, England, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Trewynnard Carminoweが1470年にイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父John Carminowは31歳，母Philippa Trenowithは21歳であった。約1516年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルボコノックでCatherine Wolvedonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1538年1月17日にイギリスコルンワルスト ミチャエル ペンキベルで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Trewynnard Carminowe(이)가 1470년 영국 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Carminow(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Philippa Trenowith(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1516년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 보코노크에서 Catherine Wolvedon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1538년 1월 17일 영국 코른월 스트 믹하얼 펜키벨에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Boconnoc, Cornwall, England: Boskennek, Kernev, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Trewynnard Carminowe nasceu em 1470, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Carminow, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Philippa Trenowith, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine Wolvedon aproximadamente 1516, em Boconnoc, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de janeiro de 1538, em St Michael Penkivel, Cornwall, Inglaterra, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Trewynnard Carminowe родился в 1470 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени John Carminow было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Philippa Trenowith, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Wolvedon около 1516 г. в местности боконнок, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 17 января 1538 г. в местности ст мачаел пенкивел, корнвалл, Англия в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas Trewynnard Carminowe nació en 1470, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, John Carminow, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Philippa Trenowith, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Catherine Wolvedon aproximadamente 1516, en Boconnoc, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 17 de enero de 1538, en St Michael Penkivel, Cornwall, Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años.
